title: Ministers rally around Keir Starmer as leadership questions grow over Mandelson saga – UK politics live
summary_full: The prime minister’s leadership is still in the spotlight after Mandelson was appointed US ambassador after he failed security vettingConservative shadow Cabinet Office minister Alex Burghart said he thought Keir Starmer and his team were “in the wrong” more than Sir Olly Robbins.Burghart told BBC One he was still waiting to hear all of the facts, but said: “I think there’s one person responsible for everything that’s happened and that’s the prime minister. Continue reading...
